arrival.subtitle: One tap, just for you. There's no wrong answer.

ack.lost: That's okay. We'll take the next step together, nice and small.
ack.curious: Love that. Let's follow what you're curious about.
ack.pressured: No rush here. There's no wrong pace — pick one small thing.
ack.motivated: Great — let's turn that into a bit of momentum.

clarityShift.afterCta: I've explored this — how clear do you feel now?

prompt.before: Before you dive in — how clear do you feel about whether this path is right for you?
prompt.after: Now you've explored it — how clear do you feel?

narrative.steady: Your sense of this path held steady. That's okay — clarity often comes a step at a time.

clearer.small: A little clearer than when you started. That's real progress.
clearer.big: Much clearer than when you started — that's a real step forward.

lessSure.small: A little less sure than when you started. That's useful too — exploring often raises good questions.
lessSure.big: Less sure than when you started — and that's genuinely useful. Sometimes exploring helps rule a path out, which is its own kind of progress.

memory.interest: You were really drawn to {career} last time.
memory.saved: You'd saved {career} to come back to.
memory.none: Good to see you again — your journey's right where you left it.

welcomeBack.prompt: What would you like to explore today?

dashboard.pageContext: A snapshot of your journeys, activity, and saved content.
dashboard.guardianPending: Waiting for guardian confirmation — tap to resend or change
dashboard.recommendedTooltip: Careers we think you'll like, based on the ones you've explored, saved, and rated.
dashboard.worthALookTooltip: Fresh, verified reads from the world of work — tuned to the careers you keep exploring.
dashboard.stageDiscoverTooltip: Discover — exploring what this career is about
dashboard.stageUnderstandTooltip: Understand — exploring the role in depth
dashboard.reloadBodySuffix: your active journey and takes you to My Journey. Your current journey stays saved in Explored Journeys, so you can switch back anytime.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.chooseGoalPrompt: Choose a Primary Goal to start
journey.completeNudge: Now try changing to an alternative career to explore further.
journey.progressTooltip: Your journey tracks your progress through Discover, Understand, and Clarity — helping you see the full picture of a career path.

discover.label: Discover
discover.subtitle: Explore the career
discover.description: Get a high-level view: what it is, who does it, salary range, and whether it's worth a closer look.
discover.tooltip: Get a feel for the career — what a typical day looks like, salary, growth outlook, and the key skills involved.
discover.confirmQuestion: Have you explored what this role is about?

understand.label: Understand
understand.subtitle: The reality, education & skills
understand.description: Go deeper into day-to-day work, qualifications, and the hard parts.
understand.tooltip: Go deeper into what the role actually involves — real education paths, entry requirements, courses, and honest reality checks.
understand.lockedTooltip: Answer the confirmation at the bottom of Discover to unlock Understand
understand.confirmQuestion: Did you understand the role in more detail?
understand.tasksTooltip: The core responsibilities and daily tasks that define this role — what you'd actually spend your time doing.
understand.realityTooltip: An honest look at what this career is really like — the challenges, trade-offs, and what makes someone a good fit.
understand.typicalDayTooltip: What a real working day looks like in this role — morning, midday, and afternoon — so you can picture yourself in it.
understand.studyPathTooltip: Real universities, colleges and vocational schools that lead to this career — filtered by your location and subjects.
understand.careerPresenceTooltip: How available this career is across Norway and nearby countries, and the tools professionals use every day.

clarity.label: Clarity
clarity.subtitle: See your full journey
clarity.description: See the full timeline, milestones, and what it takes to get there.
clarity.tooltip: This section brings everything together — showing you the full journey, timeline, and what it takes to become this.
clarity.lockedTooltip: Answer the confirmation at the bottom of Understand to unlock Clarity
clarity.addMomentumStep: Add this as one of your momentum steps

fromField.title: Real Paths from Real People
fromField.tooltip: Real career timelines contributed by parents and professionals — showing that there is more than one way to get here.

empty.description: Choose a Primary Goal — the career you want to explore properly first. We'll walk you from curiosity to a real plan, one step at a time. You can change it anytime.
empty.exploreRadar: Or explore careers in Career Radar first

careers.notTailored: Not yet tailored to your country
careers.description: Learn what different jobs are really like before deciding anything
careers.infoTooltip: Browse careers by category, search by name, or filter by salary, growth and more. Click any career to see a full breakdown including a typical day, education paths and salary info.

empty.title: No careers found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or filters

radar.description: Careers matched to your interests, work style, and strengths. The closer a dot is to the centre, the stronger the match. Tap any dot to explore that career in detail.
radar.notYouth: Sign in as a youth account to use the Career Radar.
radar.hint: Tap a career to explore it

careerSnapshot.title: Career Snapshot
careerSnapshot.tooltip: Key facts about your chosen career — salary, growth, sector, and pension.
careerSnapshot.emptyState: Choose a Primary Goal to see career info

exploredJourneys.title: Previously Explored Journeys
exploredJourneys.tooltip: Every journey you start is saved here. Switch between them anytime.

savedCareers.title: Saved careers
savedCareers.tooltip: Every career you've saved — whether from Explore Careers or from your Career Radar — collected in one place. No duplicates.

smallJobs.title: My Small Jobs
smallJobs.tooltip: Real-world small jobs you've applied to. Each one builds experience, responsibility, and confidence.

library.title: My Library
library.tooltip: Articles, videos, and resources you've saved from Industry Insights.

switchGoal.title: Switch Primary Goal to {goalTitle}?
switchGoal.description: Your current progress will be saved. You can switch back anytime.
switchGoal.canReload: You can reload it from Previously Explored Journeys on your dashboard
switchGoal.dataPreserved: All data — roadmap, foundation, preferences — is preserved
switchGoal.toastDescription: Your previous journey is saved in Previously Explored Journeys and can be reloaded anytime. Head to My Journey to start exploring your new Primary Goal.

firstLogin.cardTitle: New here? Take a quick look around
firstLogin.cardDescription: A short walkthrough that shows you what each part of the platform does — takes about 30 seconds.

profile.title: Profile
profile.youthOnly: Only youth users can access profiles.
profile.dobNote: Date of birth · set at sign-up
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell job posters a bit about yourself...
profile.savedToastDesc: Your profile has been updated successfully.

privacy.visibilityPublic: Job posters can view your profile

hero.title: Nobody teaches you how to figure out your future.
hero.subhead: You're told to choose subjects, choose a degree, and choose a career. But how are you supposed to choose something you've never seen?
hero.problem: Thousands of jobs exist, yet most people only know a handful.
hero.solution: Endeavrly helps you explore real careers, understand what they're actually like, and discover paths you never knew existed. Learn what people do, what skills matter, how jobs are changing, and what opportunities might fit you.
hero.missing: Endeavrly gives you what's been missing: real careers, honest information, and a space to explore who you are and what matters to you.
hero.payoff: So when you choose a direction, it's yours.
hero.closer: No quizzes. No pressure. Just clarity.
hero.trust: Safe, private, and built for ages 15–23 — no ads, no pressure, just clarity.
hero.tagline: The Career Operating System for young people.

framework.title: Three lenses. One journey.
framework.subtitle: Each step builds on the last. Curiosity becomes clarity, clarity becomes direction — at your own pace, on your own terms.

timeline.label: Your Timeline
timeline.title: Your journey, your pace.
timeline.subtitle: Everyone grows differently. See your progress as a gentle unfolding, not a race.

contrast.not1: A career quiz that tells you what to be.
contrast.instead1: A space to work things out for yourself — through real experiences and honest reflection.
contrast.not2: A motivational app that hypes you up.
contrast.instead2: Straightforward information about what different paths are actually like.
contrast.not3: A platform that tracks, scores, or ranks your future.
contrast.instead3: A private place to explore, try things, and grow at whatever pace feels right.

cta.title: Get started.
cta.subtitle: Free. No credit card. No commitments.

footer.copyright: © {year} Endeavrly. Helping young people build life skills and grow in confidence.

signup.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms and Privacy Policy

insights.countryNotice: These insights are based on the Norwegian labour market — we haven't tailored them to {country} yet.
insights.pageDescription: Real data on careers, industries, and the job market
insights.trustLine: Career trends and insights broken down for your age group — from global patterns to what matters for you right now.
insights.verifiedSources: Data from OECD, ILO, WEF & more · Refreshed quarterly
insights.globalSubtitle: Macro trends shaping jobs worldwide — data-led, not youth-specific
insights.jobMarketStatsDesc: Key data points from global employment research
insights.youthSubtitle: How the global landscape connects to your choices — warm, actionable, grounded
insights.aboutDataDesc: All insights are derived from Tier-1 sources and reviewed quarterly. Content is summarised for clarity.

careerTwin.title: Career Twin
careerTwin.subtitle: Talk to one possible future version of yourself in this career.
careerTwin.disclaimer: This is an AI-generated simulation to help you explore possibilities — not a prediction, and not professional careers advice. It can be inaccurate, so double-check anything important.
careerTwin.emptyBody: Choose a career so your Career Twin knows which future to simulate.
careerTwin.generalNote: I'll keep this general because I don't know much about your interests yet.
careerTwin.modesLabel: What do you want to talk about?
careerTwin.confirmAddBody: We'll add this as a next step on your journey. Nothing is added without your OK.
careerTwin.noActiveGoal: Pick a journey goal first, then your Career Twin can add steps to it.
careerTwin.meetFutureYouBody: Ask your Career Twin what this path could feel like.
careerTwin.checkInFutureYouBody: It's been a while — see how your future self responds now.
careerTwin.clarityIntroBody: Now you've got a direction in {career}, talk it through with a version of you already living it — what it feels like, what it takes, and your next move. They'll remember what you note here.
careerTwin.reflectionTip: Tip: jot a reflection above and Future You will pick it up.
careerTwin.talkToFutureSelfAs: Talk to your future self as a {career}
careerTwin.meetFutureSelfAs: Meet your future self as a {career}
careerTwin.setGoalTitle: Set this as your Primary Goal?
careerTwin.setGoalBody: We'll make {career} your Primary Goal on My Journey. You can change or customise it any time.
careerTwin.setGoalReplace: This replaces your current Primary Goal: {current}.
careerTwin.goalSetToastBody: View and customise it on My Journey.
careerTwin.goalSetErrorBody: Please try again in a moment.
careerTwin.welcomeBack: Welcome back — it's been about {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}}. Your future self has been waiting. Pick up where you left off.

recommendations.coldStart: Explore a career and we'll suggest others that fit what you're drawn to.

worthALook.emptyState: Fresh reads from the world of work will appear here.
